chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 561 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 14-10-2025 Mr. J.K Jarwar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Sanaullah Memon and Hafeezullah Memon, Superintendent Engineer and Executive Engineer, Public Health Engineering Division, Sukkur >>>>>>>..<<<<<<< Respondent No.3 / Hafeezullah Memon, Executive Engineer, Public Health Engineer Division, Sukkur is present and has filed comments, which are taken on record. Since, the comments have been filed, the B.Ws issued against the Respondents No.2 to 4 in terms of earlier order are hereby recalled / vacated. Learned Counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner at the first instance intends to approach before the Complaint Redressal Committee constituted u/s 31 (Mechanism for Redressal of Grievances) of the Sindh Public Procurement Rules, 2010, for resolving grievance against the respondents by filing Application / Complaint. He further submits that he would be satisfied, if the said committee is directed to decide his application / complaint, expeditiously in accordance with law. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. However, the Petitioner is at liberty to approach before the Complaint Redressal Committee, if such Application / Complaint, is filed by the Petitioner, the same shall be decided in accordance with law. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
